s2_bottleneck_raw: mixed (memory bandwidth + division/latency dominated), with additional penalty from non-contiguous access in Column Sweep

hotspots.location: kernel_adi(): time loop t=1..TSTEPS (overall kernel body, approx lines 86-150)
hotspots.reason: All heavy computation is inside the tsteps loop; O(TSTEPS*N^2) work with multiple full-grid sweeps and large memory traffic on u/v/p/q each timestep.

hotspots.location: kernel_adi(): Column Sweep forward elimination loop: for (i=1..N-2) for (j=1..N-2) (approx lines 99-106)
hotspots.reason: Per grid point performs several loads/stores plus two divisions with a loop-carried dependency via p[i][j-1], q[i][j-1] (Thomas algorithm), limiting vectorization and increasing latency sensitivity.

hotspots.location: kernel_adi(): Column Sweep back substitution loop: for (i=1..N-2) for (j=N-2..1) (approx lines 109-111)
hotspots.reason: Streaming update of v[j][i] with dependency on v[j+1][i]; memory access to v is strided (non-unit stride in row-major layout), causing poor cache-line utilization and low effective bandwidth.

hotspots.location: kernel_adi(): Row Sweep forward elimination loop: for (i=1..N-2) for (j=1..N-2) (approx lines 120-126)
hotspots.reason: Similar to column forward elimination: divisions and loop-carried dependency via p[i][j-1], q[i][j-1]; additionally reads v[i-1][j], v[i][j], v[i+1][j] (good unit-stride for j, but still bandwidth-heavy).

hotspots.location: kernel_adi(): Row Sweep back substitution loop: for (i=1..N-2) for (j=N-2..1) (approx lines 128-130)
hotspots.reason: Streaming update of u[i][j] with dependency on u[i][j+1]; unit-stride access but still dominated by memory traffic and limited ILP due to recurrence.

hotspots.location: print_array(): full matrix print (approx lines 44-63) [only if enabled in the run configuration]
hotspots.reason: If PolyBench dump/print is enabled, I/O dominates runtime; otherwise it is typically excluded/disabled for performance runs.

bottleneck_type.reasoning: The kernel performs multiple full sweeps over large 2D arrays (u, v, p, q) each timestep with relatively low arithmetic intensity (a handful of flops per several loads/stores). Additionally, the column sweep accesses u/v with non-unit stride in row-major layout, reducing effective bandwidth. Loop-carried dependencies prevent wide SIMD from hiding memory latency, making performance largely limited by memory subsystem rather than peak compute.

gpu_suitability.reasoning: The workload is large and regular (O(TSTEPS*N^2)) and parallel across many independent 1D tridiagonal systems per sweep (one per i). However, each system has a sequential dependency along j (Thomas algorithm), which limits per-system parallelism and makes naive GPU mapping inefficient. Performance can still be good if many systems are solved concurrently and memory accesses are made coalesced (especially for the column sweep).
gpu_suitability.recommended_approach: Use a batched tridiagonal solver approach: map each i-line to a thread block/warp and solve with (1) parallel cyclic reduction (PCR) or hybrid Thomas+PCR to increase parallelism, or (2) warp-level Thomas for moderate N with many warps in flight. Store/operate on transposed (or pitched) arrays so the swept dimension is contiguous for coalesced loads/stores. Fuse simple boundary assignments into kernels, keep u/v/p/q resident on device across all timesteps, and use two kernels per sweep (forward+back) or a single kernel if using a parallel tridiagonal method.

validation.corrected_bottleneck: mixed (memory bandwidth + division/latency dominated), with additional penalty from non-contiguous access in Column Sweep
validation.reasoning: 该 ADI/Thomas 形式每个 (i) 上沿 j 存在严格 loop-carried 依赖，导致难以向量化/并行化来隐藏延迟；同时每步包含两次除法(或一次除法+一次乘法若做倒数优化)与多次访存。对大 N 时，Row Sweep 的 v[i][j] 访问是连续的，较接近带宽受限；但 Column Sweep 访问 u[j][i] 在 C 行主序下是跨行步长 N 的 gather/scatter，缓存命中率差、TLB/预取效果差，表现为“带宽+延迟”混合瓶颈。若 DATA_TYPE 为 double，除法吞吐/延迟在依赖链上更显著；因此单纯归类为 memory-only 不够准确。print_array 在默认 PolyBench 配置通常被 DCE 包装但仍可能执行；若启用输出则 I/O 可完全主导时间，这属于配置问题而非 kernel 本身。

detailed_optimizations.target: Column Sweep: 减少跨步长访问导致的缓存/TLB 低效
detailed_optimizations.technique: 数据布局变换：为列扫引入转置/SoA 缓冲，使内层 j 访问连续；或维护 u 的转置副本 uT
detailed_optimizations.expected_speedup: 1.3x-2.2x（取决于 N、缓存层级与是否同时为 v 做转置；Column Sweep 常见可提升 30%-120%）

detailed_optimizations.target: Row Sweep: 提升内层吞吐并降低除法开销
detailed_optimizations.technique: 代数重写：提取公共子表达式 + 用倒数替代重复除法；FMA 友好化
detailed_optimizations.expected_speedup: 1.1x-1.4x（double 下更明显；若编译器原本未做 CSE/reciprocal）

detailed_optimizations.target: 两次 sweep 的 p/q 存储带宽与容量压力
detailed_optimizations.technique: 将 p/q 从 N×N 降为每行/每列的 1D 临时数组（流式 Thomas），减少写回与缓存污染
detailed_optimizations.expected_speedup: 1.2x-1.8x（显著降低 p/q 的内存流量与工作集；对大 N 更明显）

detailed_optimizations.target: CPU 并行：利用 i 维独立性（每个 i 是独立三对角系统）
detailed_optimizations.technique: OpenMP 并行化外层 i；线程私有临时 p/q（配合上一条）
detailed_optimizations.expected_speedup: 接近内存带宽上限：2x-10x（取决于核数与内存带宽；常见 4-8 核可 3x-6x）

detailed_optimizations.target: 向量化与编译器优化可见性（尽管 j 依赖限制 SIMD）
detailed_optimizations.technique: 减少别名 + 对回代循环做轻量 unroll；对常量使用 constexpr；启用 fast-math(可选)
detailed_optimizations.code_changes:
1) 使用 restrict（C）或编译器扩展/指针别名消除：
void kernel_adi(... DATA_TYPE (*restrict u)[N], ...)
2) 将常量 kcol=(1+2*d), krow=(1+2*a) 提前。
3) 回代循环可手动 unroll 2（依赖仍在，但可减少分支/索引开销）：
for (j=n-2; j>=1; j-=2) { ... j ...; if (j-1>=1) ... j-1 ... }
4) 若允许数值差异：-ffast-math 或 -freciprocal-math 让编译器用倒数乘法。

detailed_optimizations.target: print_array 导致的 I/O 主导（若启用输出）
detailed_optimizations.technique: 运行配置隔离：基准计时不打印；或仅打印校验 hash
detailed_optimizations.expected_speedup: 若当前在打印：可达 10x-1000x（取决于输出量）；若未打印：0

gpu_implementation.strategy: 以“很多条独立三对角系统并发”映射 GPU：每个 i 对应一条长度 ~N 的 Thomas 系统。采用 1 block 处理 1 条或多条系统：线程在 block 内协作把该系统的 u/v 片段加载到 shared memory，然后由单线程或 warp-serial 执行递推（因依赖不可并行），并行度来自大量 i（约 N 条）。更激进：使用 parallel cyclic reduction(PCR)/Thomas+PCR 混合以在单条系统内并行，但实现复杂且对数值稳定/性能敏感。
gpu_implementation.data_layout:
为保证合并访问(coalescing)：
- 将列扫所需的 u[j][i] 访问改为存储转置 uT[i][j]（或直接以列主序存储 u），使 j 方向连续。
- 同理为 v 建 vT 以便 Row Sweep 读取连续，或在两次 sweep 间做一次转置。
- p/q 不建议存全局二维；在 GPU 上用 shared memory 或寄存器保存每条系统的 p/q（长度 N），或分段处理（tile）以适配 shared memory 容量。
challenges: 单条三对角系统的递推依赖导致线程内串行，GPU 利用率依赖于系统数量(N)与每条系统长度；N 不够大时占用不足
shared memory 容量限制：若 N 很大，p/q/u 片段无法一次装入，需要分段或使用全局内存（会降低性能）
转置开销：每 timestep 做 u/v 转置会引入额外 O(N^2) 带宽流量；需与列扫收益权衡，可用融合转置（在写回时顺便写转置副本）降低额外遍历
数值稳定与精度：PCR/并行三对角算法可能引入不同舍入误差；需要验证误差容忍度
gpu_implementation.expected_speedup: 相对单核 CPU：10x-80x（取决于 N、TSTEPS、是否采用转置/共享内存、以及 GPU/CPU 带宽比）。相对多核优化后 CPU（OpenMP + 1D p/q + 转置）：通常 2x-10x。若仅做朴素 GPU Thomas 且不解决列扫非合并访问，可能仅 1x-3x 或更差。

performance_analysis.arithmetic_intensity: 约 0.15-0.35 FLOPs/byte（不含缓存复用时）。估算：以 forward elimination 的一次迭代为例，约 15-25 FLOPs（含 1 次除法折算为若干 FLOPs）并涉及 u 三点读取(3*8B)、p/q 读写(读2写2=32B)、以及少量常量/寄存器；合计约 56-80B => 0.2-0.4 FLOPs/B。若 Column Sweep 因跨步长导致有效带宽下降，表现更像延迟受限而非纯带宽。
performance_analysis.cache_behavior: Row Sweep：v[i][j] 在 j 内层连续，硬件预取有效；p/q 若为二维会产生大写流量并污染缓存。Column Sweep：u[j][i] 在 j 内层跨步长 N，几乎每次触及新 cache line，L1/L2 命中率低，TLB 压力大；回代写 v[j][i] 同样跨步长写，写分配(RFO)会额外读入 cache line（可考虑 non-temporal store 但依赖后续 Row Sweep 读取 v，通常不适合）。若采用 uT/vT 或块转置，可显著改善局部性与带宽利用率。
data_dependencies: forward elimination: p[i][j] 与 q[i][j] 依赖 p[i][j-1], q[i][j-1]（沿 j 的递推依赖，限制 SIMD/并行）
back substitution: v[j][i] 依赖 v[j+1][i]（沿 j 反向递推依赖）
Row Sweep 同理：p/q 递推依赖 + u 回代依赖 u[i][j+1]
t 维依赖：Row Sweep 产生的 u 用于下一 timestep 的 Column Sweep（时间步串行）

stage2.bottleneck_raw: mixed (memory bandwidth + division/latency dominated), with additional penalty from non-contiguous access in Column Sweep
